findings.title: Hardcoded secret key
findings.description: The application contains a hardcoded secret key which can lead to security vulnerabilities if exposed.
findings.suggestion: Use environment variables or a secure vault to manage secret keys.

findings.title: Bare except clause
findings.description: The code contains a bare except clause which catches all exceptions without specifying the exception type. This can lead to catching unexpected exceptions and make debugging difficult.
findings.suggestion: Specify the exception type to catch only the expected exceptions, e.g., `except jsonschema.exceptions.ValidationError:`.

findings.title: Bare except clause
findings.description: The code contains a bare except clause which catches all exceptions without specifying the exception type. This can lead to catching unexpected exceptions and make debugging difficult.
findings.suggestion: Specify the exception type to catch only the expected exceptions, e.g., `except IndexError:`.

findings.title: Bare except clause
findings.description: The code contains a bare except clause which catches all exceptions without specifying the exception type. This can lead to catching unexpected exceptions and make debugging difficult.
findings.code_snippet:
except:
    return Response(error_message_helper("An error occurred!"), 200, mimetype="application/json")
findings.suggestion: Specify the exception type to catch only the expected exceptions, e.g., `except Exception as e:`.
